title: Ascendency Path of Veil
atAGlance: A precision path for repositioning, misdirection, and tempo manipulation under pressure.
sageNotes: Veil adepts are masters of angle and tempo, slipping through notice before steel is even drawn. Their best tales are told in Emberfall lanes where one misstep can kindle a district feud. To walk the Veil is to win by position, misdirection, and the moment no one else perceived.
gameInformation: Strong for rogues, rangers, and tactical casters. Core unlock examples: Veiled Step, Omen Split, Stolen Moment, and Crown of Echoes.
